text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the spring Tenno Sho arrives. Among
the competitors is Mejiro McQueen, set on
winning the race for the third consecutive year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower heads to the starting gates of this
grand race, hoping to make a miracle happen.
